title: Matchbox (Murder Mystery)
description: This adds the newly trending matchbox mode to your minecraft server!
body:
DISCLAIMER: I am NOT the original owner of this idea, I simply wrote the plugin code, here is their offical channel: https://www.youtube.com/@M4TCH80X

In Matchbox there are a max of 7 players, 1 is the Spark (Murderer) and the other is the Medic who can revive you, you can only communicate with signs, and you are annyomous the entire game, each round is 10 minutes, after each round is a 10 minute voting process, where you try to vote out the Spark before he votes everyone else out. To kill someone as the spark you right click with an empty slot, to revive someone is the same, if you want more information, check out: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dmwAJjVQRNc for the rules

COMMANDS:

/StartGame - can only be ran as an operator, used to start the game

/Vote - only used during meetings to vote on who you think the Spark is

/EscapeVote - same as vote except for you can use it to skip voting

/swap (g) - only used by the Spark and has a 2 minute cooldown, can be used to swap places with a random player

If you want to support, please go checkout M4tch80X's youtube page which ive put a link to at the top.
